name: AIRecon API Security
description: API security testing knowledge covering REST, GraphQL, gRPC, authentication bypass, injection, IDOR, and rate-limit evasion patterns.
sample_queries: How should you discover undocumented API endpoints?
What is the methodology for testing REST API authentication?
How to test for GraphQL introspection vulnerabilities?
What are common IDOR patterns in REST APIs?
How to bypass API rate limiting?
notes: First-party AIRecon dataset. Used in ANALYSIS and EXPLOIT phases. Covers API endpoint discovery, auth bypass, injection in API params, and business logic flaws.
